title: 2 Pack Garden Hose Connector, Brass Garden Hose Tap Connector, 1/2 Inch and 3/4 Inch 2-in-1 Female Threaded Faucet Quick Connector, Garden Hose Pipe Faucet Adapter
features: 【 High Quality 】 Garden hose tap connector made of high quality brass, solid brass construction to make sure garden hose fittings not rust or corrode easily,not easy to break, rubber gaskets effectively prevent water leakage, make it nice watertight seal.
【 Package Includes 】 Come with 2 pieces of 1/2 inch and 3/4 inch 2-in-1 water hose connectors.

【 2 in 1 Connector 】 1/2 inch & 3/4 inch 2-in-1 tap garden hose pipe adapter suitable for use with 95 per cent of all outdoor threaded taps. each piece of hose fittings can be divided into 2 pieces, when they combine, the connector is fits for 1/2 inch sized faucet, while take the top off, it suitable for 3/4 inch tap.

【 Easy Installation 】 These garden hose fittings is easy to connect and disassemble, internal thread quick connected, which can be quickly connected in a few seconds, and disassembly is only to pull down the body.

【 Wide Applications 】 You can enjoy these brass garden hose connectors work perfectly with any standard garden hose, watering device, camper, drip irrigation, washing machine, faucets, lawn sprinkler, water nozzle, spigot.
description: 2 Pack Garden Hose Tap Pipe Connectors The 1/2 Inch 3/4 Inch 2-in-1 Garden Hose Tap Connector is made of brass, reliable quality, difficult to break and no corrosion, extended lifespan compared with plastic hose fittings. SPECIFICATIONS Main material: brass Female thread diameter: 20 mm (1/2 inch), 25 mm (3/4 inch) PACKAGE INCLUDES 2 x 2-in-1 garden hose tap connector APPLICABLE TAPS' SIZES Each piece of hose fittings can be divided into 2 pieces, when they combine, the connector is fits for 1/2 inch sized faucet, while take the top off, it suitable for 3/4 inch tap. QUICK ANS EASY TO INSTALLATION Female and male thread make it put on and take off easily, allows fast and easy connection without any additional tools, quick joint to make tap and hose connecting easily.
